overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a circular gothic-style divination classroom with stone walls, red velvet curtains, and wooden tables holding glowing crystal balls. One character stands motionless near a stone fireplace while another walks across the circular room and exits, with the camera remaining fixed throughout the sequence.

large ornate circular carpet covering the wooden floor center

segments.scene_description: The camera maintains a fixed position in a circular gothic classroom with warm mixed lighting from candles and tall windows. A character in dark robes stands permanently near the stone fireplace on the left, while a second character enters from the right foreground, walks across the circular patterned rug in the center, and exits to the left. The room features multiple wooden tables with glowing crystal balls, heavy red velvet curtains, and an ornate iron chandelier, creating a mystical academic atmosphere typical of a divination classroom.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static perspective of a mystical gothic classroom as a single figure traverses the circular space. It begins with a wide view of the room, where warm candlelight and soft window light illuminate wooden tables topped with glowing crystal balls and heavy red velvet curtains. As the scene unfolds, a character in dark robes remains motionless by a stone fireplace on the left while a second figure enters from the right foreground. The camera captures this character walking across a circular patterned rug in the center of the room, passing beneath an ornate iron chandelier. The movement concludes as the figure exits to the left, leaving the quiet, academic atmosphere of the divination classroom undisturbed.
